runtime_conversion_notes: Native sherpa-onnx streaming transducer (zipformer, bilingual ZH+EN) consumed directly via OnlineRecognizer transducer model field (encoder/decoder/joiner int8) on the v1.13.2 Android runtime. No format conversion required.
notes: ZH/EN bilingual A2 demo model. Streaming transducer int8. One model covers both ZH speaker and EN speaker dialogue flows. Downloaded to device, NOT bundled in APK. sha256/artifact_size_mb describe the encoder artifact; package-evidence.json enumerates all four files. A2 demo evidence is not a launch-support claim; support matrix still requires WS6 benchmark evidence.
